checkInDate.description:
check-in date of the stay (hotel local date). Format YYYY-MM-DD
The lowest accepted value is today date (no dates in the past).

checkOutDate.description:
check-out date of the stay (hotel local date). Format YYYY-MM-DD
The lowest accepted value is `checkInDate`+1.

rateCode.description:
Special Rate - Provider Response Code (3 chars)
Examples

  * RAC - Rack

  * BAR - Best Available Rate

  * PRO - Promotional

  * COR - Corporate

  * GOV - Government (qualified)

  * AAA - AAA (qualified)

  * BNB - Bed and Breakfast

  * PKG - Package

  * TVL - Travel Industry

  * SPC - Special Promo Rate

  * WKD - Weekend

  * CON - Convention

  * SNR - Senior (Europe) (qualified)

  * ARP - AARP - American Association of Retired People (50+) (qualified)

  * SRS - Senior (qualified)

  * ROR - Room Only Rate (no breakfast)

  * FAM - Family

  * DAY - Day rate

category.description:
Special Rate Category
Examples:
  ASSOCIATION
  FAMILY_PLAN

percentage.description: Percentage of the commission paid to the travel seller. Value is between 0 and 100

amount.description: Amount of the commission paid to the travel seller. The amount is always linked to the currency code of the offer

description.description: Specific type to convey a list of string for specific information type ( via qualifier) in specific character set, or language
description.title: QualifiedFreeText

type.description:
Room type code, 3 character identifier of the room.
The first character identifies the room type category. 
The second numeric character identifies the number of beds. 
The third character identifies the bed type. 
There is a special case where ROH is returned, this value stands for Run Of House.

description.description: Specific type to convey a list of string for specific information type ( via qualifier) in specific character set, or language
description.title: QualifiedFreeText

adults.description: number of adult guests (1-9) per room

childAges.description: Comma separated list of ages of each child at the time of check-out from the hotel. If several children have the same age, the ages will be repeated.

currency.description: currency Code apply to all elements of the price

sellingTotal.description: sellingTotal = Total + margins + markup + totalFees - discounts

items.title: Markup
items.description: Markup applied to provide a service or a product to the client. Typical use case is to convey markup information set by the travel agent.

amount.description: Defines the monetary value with decimal position as a String.

code.description:
The tax code which identifies the tax.
  Examples:
  1=BED_TAX
  2=CITY_TAX

percentage.description: percentage of the tax. Use together with pricingFrequency and pricingMode

included.description: Is the tax included in the base amount

pricingFrequency.description:
Specifies if the tax applies per stay or per night
  - PER_STAY
  - PER_NIGHT

pricingMode.description:
Specifies if the tax applies per occupant or per room
  - PER_OCCUPANT
  - PER_PRODUCT

variations.title: HotelProduct_PriceVariations
variations.description: Daily price variations and the average daily price (when available) is shown here

changes.description:
The collection of price periods.
Even if the daily price is not changeing during the stay, this section is filled

items.title: HotelProduct_PriceVariation
items.description: Some prices may vary during a stay, thus here you can see the daily price per period of the stay

startDate.description:
Begin date of the period
Format: YYYY-MM-DD

endDate.description:
End date of the period
Format: YYYY-MM-DD

paymentType.description: payment type. Guarantee means Pay at Check Out. Check the `methods` in `guarantee` or `deposit` or `prepay`.

guarantee.title: HotelProduct_GuaranteePolicy
guarantee.description: the guarantee policy information applicable to the offer. It includes accepted payments

deposit.title: HotelProduct_DepositPolicy
deposit.description: the deposit/prepay policy information applicable to the offer. It includes accepted payments, deadline and the amount due

deadline.description:
The date and time of the deadline in ISO 8601[https://www.w3.org/TR/NOTE-datetime]. 
 Example: 2010-08-14T13:00:00
 Please note that this value is expressed in the hotels local time zone

prepay.title: HotelProduct_DepositPolicy
prepay.description: the deposit/prepay policy information applicable to the offer. It includes accepted payments, deadline and the amount due

deadline.description:
The date and time of the deadline in ISO 8601[https://www.w3.org/TR/NOTE-datetime]. 
 Example: 2010-08-14T13:00:00
 Please note that this value is expressed in the hotels local time zone

The date and time of the deadline in ISO 8601[https://www.w3.org/TR/NOTE-datetime]. 
 Example: 2010-08-14T13:00:00
 Please note that this value is expressed in the hotels local time zone

checkIn.description: Check-in From time limit in ISO-8601 format [http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#time]

checkOut.description: Check-out Until time limit in ISO-8601 format [http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#time]

items.title: HotelProduct_CancellationPolicy
items.description: Cancellation policies are optional in response (whether they apply or not according to the provider response returned at pricing or sell.

type.description: * FULL_STAY: the Penalty amount equals the `total` price.

numberOfNights.description: Number of nights due as fee in case of cancellation.

percentage.description: Percentage of the total stay amount to be paid in case of cancellation. Value is between 0 and 100.

deadline.description:
Represents the deadline after which the penalty applies. DateTime is in ISO 8601 [https://www.w3.org/TR/NOTE-datetime].
Example: 2010-08-14T12:00:00+01:00
Example: 2010-08-14T12:00:00Z
Example: 2010-08-14T12:00:00-01:00
The value is expressed in the hotel local time zone, with the added time zone difference. So you can compute the deadline in UTC(GMT) if desired.

rateFamilyEstimated.title: HotelProduct_RateFamily
rateFamilyEstimated.description: The estimated rate code family of the offer. Grouping various rate plan codes that belongs to the same family and indicates the type of the rate

type.description: The type of the rate (public=P, negotiated=N, conditional=C)
